---
title: "ssGSEA Analysis Tool"
output: n/a
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

##############################################################################
## ssGSEA analysis + visualization (post-RNA-seq)                            ##
## - Reads expression matrix (genes x samples)                               ##
## - Builds gene sets from GMT or MSigDB (msigdbr)                           ##
## - Runs ssGSEA (GSVA)                                                      ##
## - Outputs scores, PCA, heatmap, and per-pathway boxplots                  ##
##############################################################################

##############################################################################
## 0. CONFIGURATION                                                          ##
##############################################################################
expr_file        <- "Sacral24_4ssGSEA.csv"            # genes x samples (rows=genes, cols=samples)
metadata_file    <- "GRCg7b_metadata_4ssGSEA.csv"     # optional: columns = sample, group
species_name     <- "Gallus gallus"                   # used for MSigDB (if available)

# Gene set inputs (choose ONE)
gmt_file         <- ""                                # path to .gmt (preferred for non-human)
msig_collection  <- "H"                               # e.g., H, C2, C5 (msigdbr "collection")
msig_subcollection <- ""                              # e.g., "CP:KEGG" (optional; msigdbr "subcollection")

# Filters
minGSSize        <- 10
maxGSSize        <- 500

# ssGSEA settings (new GSVA API uses alpha/normalize; old API uses method="ssgsea")
ssgsea_alpha     <- 0.25
ssgsea_normalize <- TRUE

# Output
outdir           <- "ssgsea_output"

# Behavior
install_missing  <- FALSE
set.seed(1234)

##############################################################################
## 1. PACKAGES                                                               ##
##############################################################################
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")

cran_pkgs <- c("readr","dplyr","tibble","ggplot2","stringr","tidyr","pheatmap")
bio_pkgs  <- c("GSVA","GSEABase","msigdbr","BiocParallel")

maybe_install <- function(pkgs, bioc = FALSE) {
  for (p in pkgs) {
    if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE) && isTRUE(install_missing)) {
      if (bioc) BiocManager::install(p, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
      else install.packages(p, dependencies = TRUE)
    }
  }
}
maybe_install(cran_pkgs, bioc = FALSE)
maybe_install(bio_pkgs, bioc = TRUE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(pheatmap)
  library(GSVA)
  library(GSEABase)
  library(msigdbr)
  library(BiocParallel)
})

##############################################################################
## 2. PATH / IO HELPERS                                                      ##
##############################################################################
resolve_path <- function(p) {
  # Makes this script run both locally and in environments where uploads live under /mnt/data
  if (is.null(p) || !nzchar(p)) return(p)
  if (file.exists(p)) return(p)
  p2 <- file.path("/mnt/data", p)
  if (file.exists(p2)) return(p2)
  return(p)
}

expr_file     <- resolve_path(expr_file)
metadata_file <- resolve_path(metadata_file)
gmt_file      <- resolve_path(gmt_file)

read_matrix <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) stop("Expression file not found: ", path)
  ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(path))

  df <- if (ext %in% c("tsv", "txt")) {
    readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  } else {
    readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  }

  if (ncol(df) < 2) stop("Expression file must have at least 2 columns (gene + samples).")

  gene_ids <- df[[1]]
  if (any(is.na(gene_ids)) || all(!nzchar(as.character(gene_ids)))) {
    stop("First column of expression file must contain gene identifiers (non-empty).")
  }

  expr <- df[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  expr_mat <- as.matrix(expr)
  rownames(expr_mat) <- as.character(gene_ids)

  # Coerce to numeric
  suppressWarnings(storage.mode(expr_mat) <- "numeric")
  if (all(is.na(expr_mat))) stop("Expression matrix could not be parsed as numeric (all NA after coercion).")

  # Drop rows that are entirely NA
  keep_rows <- rowSums(!is.na(expr_mat)) > 0
  expr_mat <- expr_mat[keep_rows, , drop = FALSE]

  # Ensure sample names are present
  if (is.null(colnames(expr_mat)) || any(!nzchar(colnames(expr_mat)))) {
    stop("Expression matrix must have sample names as column headers.")
  }

  expr_mat
}

read_metadata <- function(path, sample_col = "sample", group_col = "group") {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NULL)

  ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(path))
  meta <- if (ext %in% c("tsv", "txt")) {
    readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  } else {
    readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  }

  # Normalize column names (in case of capitalization variations)
  nms <- names(meta)
  names(meta) <- tolower(nms)

  sample_col <- tolower(sample_col)
  group_col  <- tolower(group_col)

  if (!all(c(sample_col, group_col) %in% names(meta))) {
    stop("Metadata file must include columns: ", sample_col, ", ", group_col)
  }

  meta <- meta %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sample = as.character(.data[[sample_col]]),
      group  = as.character(.data[[group_col]])
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, group) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(sample), nzchar(sample), !is.na(group), nzchar(group)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(sample, .keep_all = TRUE)

  meta
}

##############################################################################
## 3. LOAD DATA                                                              ##
##############################################################################
expr_mat <- read_matrix(expr_file)

# Remove duplicated gene rows by max variance
if (any(duplicated(rownames(expr_mat)))) {
  expr_tbl <- as.data.frame(expr_mat) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(row_var = apply(dplyr::select(., -gene), 1, stats::var, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(gene) %>%
    dplyr::slice_max(order_by = row_var, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::select(-row_var)

  expr_mat <- expr_tbl %>% tibble::column_to_rownames("gene") %>% as.matrix()
}

meta <- read_metadata(metadata_file)

# Align metadata to samples if provided
if (!is.null(meta)) {
  if (!all(colnames(expr_mat) %in% meta$sample)) {
    missing <- setdiff(colnames(expr_mat), meta$sample)
    stop("Metadata missing samples: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", "))
  }
  meta <- meta %>% dplyr::slice(match(colnames(expr_mat), sample))
}

##############################################################################
## 4. GENE SETS                                                              ##
##############################################################################
if (nzchar(gmt_file)) {
  if (!file.exists(gmt_file)) stop("GMT file not found: ", gmt_file)
  gmt <- GSEABase::getGmt(gmt_file)
  gene_sets <- GSEABase::geneIds(gmt)
} else {
  msig_species <- msigdbr::msigdbr_species()$species_name
  if (!species_name %in% msig_species) {
    stop("MSigDB does not support species '", species_name, "'. Provide a GMT file.")
  }

  subcoll <- if (nzchar(msig_subcollection)) msig_subcollection else NULL

  msig <- msigdbr::msigdbr(
    species       = species_name,
    collection    = msig_collection,
    subcollection = subcoll
  )

  gene_sets <- msig %>%
    dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(gs_name), nzchar(gs_name), !is.na(gene_symbol), nzchar(gene_symbol)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(gs_name) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(genes = list(unique(gene_symbol)), .groups = "drop")

  gene_sets <- setNames(gene_sets$genes, gene_sets$gs_name)
}

# Intersect gene sets with expression genes (important for non-human / mapping differences)
gene_sets <- lapply(gene_sets, intersect, rownames(expr_mat))

# Filter gene set sizes (post-intersection)
sizes <- vapply(gene_sets, length, integer(1))
keep <- sizes >= minGSSize & sizes <= maxGSSize
gene_sets <- gene_sets[keep]
if (length(gene_sets) == 0) stop("No gene sets left after filtering. Adjust min/max size or use a GMT file.")

##############################################################################
## 5. ssGSEA                                                                 ##
##############################################################################
if (!dir.exists(outdir)) dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE)

message("Running ssGSEA (GSVA) ...")

# GSVA has an updated API in recent Bioconductor releases:
# - New: construct an ssgseaParam() object, then gsva(param)
# - Old: gsva(expr, geneSets, method="ssgsea", ...)
run_ssgsea <- function(expr_mat, gene_sets) {
  if (exists("ssgseaParam", where = asNamespace("GSVA"), inherits = FALSE)) {
    # New API
    param <- GSVA::ssgseaParam(
      exprData  = expr_mat,
      geneSets  = gene_sets,
      minSize   = minGSSize,
      maxSize   = maxGSSize,
      alpha     = ssgsea_alpha,
      normalize = ssgsea_normalize,
      checkNA   = "auto",
      use       = "everything"
    )
    res <- GSVA::gsva(param, verbose = FALSE, BPPARAM = BiocParallel::SerialParam(progressbar = FALSE))
    return(res)
  }

  # Old API fallback
  # Heuristic to choose kcdf (legacy argument; not used by new API)
  kcdf <- if (max(expr_mat, na.rm = TRUE) > 50) "Poisson" else "Gaussian"
  message("Using legacy GSVA API with kcdf='", kcdf, "'.")

  res <- GSVA::gsva(
    expr_mat, gene_sets,
    method  = "ssgsea",
    kcdf    = kcdf,
    min.sz  = minGSSize,
    max.sz  = maxGSSize,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  return(res)
}

ssgsea_scores <- run_ssgsea(expr_mat, gene_sets)

# Save scores
write.csv(ssgsea_scores, file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_scores.csv"))
saveRDS(ssgsea_scores, file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_scores.rds"))

##############################################################################
## 6. PCA                                                                    ##
##############################################################################
pca <- prcomp(t(ssgsea_scores), scale. = TRUE)
pca_df <- data.frame(pca$x, sample = rownames(pca$x))

if (!is.null(meta)) {
  pca_df <- pca_df %>% left_join(meta, by = c("sample" = "sample"))
}

p_pca <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = if (!is.null(meta)) group else NULL), size = 3) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  labs(title = "ssGSEA PCA", color = "Group")

ggsave(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_pca.pdf"), p_pca, width = 6, height = 5)

##############################################################################
## 7. HEATMAP (top variable pathways)                                        ##
##############################################################################
pathway_var <- apply(ssgsea_scores, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE)
top_n <- min(30, length(pathway_var))
heatmat <- ssgsea_scores[names(sort(pathway_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:top_n], , drop = FALSE]

annotation_col <- NULL
if (!is.null(meta)) {
  annotation_col <- meta %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, group) %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("sample")
}

pdf(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_heatmap_top_variable.pdf"), width = 8, height = 10)
pheatmap::pheatmap(
  heatmat,
  scale = "row",
  annotation_col = annotation_col,
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  main = "Top variable ssGSEA pathways"
)
dev.off()

##############################################################################
## 8. BOXPLOTS (top 10 variable pathways)                                    ##
##############################################################################
if (!is.null(meta)) {
  top_paths <- names(sort(pathway_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:min(10, length(pathway_var))]
  long_df <- as.data.frame(ssgsea_scores[top_paths, , drop = FALSE]) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("pathway") %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(-pathway, names_to = "sample", values_to = "score") %>%
    left_join(meta, by = c("sample" = "sample"))

  p_box <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = group, y = score, fill = group)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 1.2, alpha = 0.7) +
    facet_wrap(~ pathway, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(title = "Top variable ssGSEA pathways", x = "Group", y = "ssGSEA score")

  ggsave(file.path(outdir, "ssgsea_boxplots_top_variable.pdf"), p_box, width = 10, height = 8)
}

##############################################################################
## 9. SESSION INFO                                                           ##
##############################################################################
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), file.path(outdir, "sessionInfo.txt"))
message("ssGSEA analysis complete. Outputs in: ", normalizePath(outdir))

```
